channel.title: Linux on stultus notes
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on stultus notes

item.title: The Nginx sites-available/sites-enabled Split Is a Debian Convention
item.description: Nginx loads what its include directives reference. The two-directory split for site configs is a Debian-flavoured human workflow, not a runtime feature.

item.title: One OS to Rule Them All - Linux Parody
item.description: Parody of Tolkien’s Ring Verse celebrating Linux and open source.
